title: BLUE MOUNTAIN EARLY LEARNING HUB - 211info
text: INTERMOUNTAIN EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT BLUE MOUNTAIN EARLY LEARNING HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports programs for children and families, including kindergarten readiness, health, safety, and child care. Connects families to partnering agencies. 2001 SW Nye Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 966-3197 ..12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Administration (541) 966-3197 Marissa Loiland [email protected] Application (541) 314-3990 Coordinated Enrollment Specialist Michelle Gomez [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Morrow, Umatilla, and Union Counties Services: School Readiness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - SPECIAL EDUCATION EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOLING PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY INTERVENTION/EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
